headline: A Look At Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) Valuation After Geopolitics Fuel Travel Stock Rally
summary: Geopolitics, a relief rally, and fresh attention on NCLH Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) jumped 6.2% in a broad travel stock rally after reports of a temporary delay in planned military strikes in Iran and encouraging peace discussions eased immediate geopolitical worries. This relief move brought fresh attention to NCLH at a time when the company is also highlighting its product lineup, including the recently showcased Norwegian Luna, and investors are reassessing cruise exposure...

headline: Trump Blinks on Iran And Wall Street Thanks Him for It
summary: A five-day pause on potential U.S. strikes against Iranian energy infrastructure was all it took to flip a sea of red into a splash of green on Monday. Oil fell hard, rates retreated, and cruise and airline stocks surged, while Tesla's Terafab chip ambitions and Berkshire's latest Japan move added some genuine corporate substance to the session.
